title: Cook
perk_direction: Food restores more and lasts longer, allowing longer trips without eating again.

title: Hunter
earned_by: Killing, skinning and harvesting more animals than other activities.
perk_direction: Improved harvests, tracking and hunting progression.

title: Peddler
earned_by: Selling pelts, wagons and goods; completing trade activity.
perk_direction: Improved trade reputation and commerce benefits.

title: Exterminator
perk_direction: Infected-related rewards and recognition as a frontier protector.

title: Crook
earned_by: Theft, burglary, stolen goods and lockpicking.

title: Murderer
earned_by: Excessive innocent NPC and player kills.
perk_direction: Primarily a reputation consequence; the frontier remembers.
